assets.prompt: dark fantasy casual tower defense game art, stylized 2D hand-painted game UI asset, clean bold readable silhouette, high contrast rim light, dark navy mood, mobile game friendly, no text, no watermark, no logo. Asset id: ui_hand_panel. Primary request: wide horizontal hand cards tray base panel for bottom HUD, low-saturation dark grey-blue iron and stone material, subtle hand-painted texture, thin antique silver edge with faint cyan highlights, close to rectangular shape, only very narrow corner ornaments, no large bevels or diagonal chamfer intruding into card slots, 9-slice source panel, center area intentionally plain and stretchable for card slots, transparent outside the panel, no card slots, no icons, no text. Composition: panel centered, fills about 90 percent of the canvas width and 36 percent of canvas height, generous transparent padding, perfectly front-facing orthographic UI asset. Constraints: must work as nine-slice stretched to 800x180; corners and borders should be decorative but compact; middle must be clean and low contrast. Avoid: photorealistic, cinematic poster, complex background, large angled corners, oversized decorations, bright saturated colors, beige parchment, purple gradients, text, letters, numbers, watermark, logo, cards, characters.
